content: Jenassa: That guard earlier had no idea what he was getting into. A pity he didn’t live long enough to learn his lesson... or to feel my blade in more... interesting ways. Bjorlam: Gods, woman. You’ve got a mouth on you. I bet that guard’s corpse is still warm where you left it. Jenassa: Warm and spread open for the crows... or anyone else who fancies a turn. Bjorlam: Fuck, you’re twisted. But then again, who isn’t in this shithole? Saw a pack of bandits fucking a bound Imperial soldier just outside Riverwood last week. Didn’t even wait for him to die first. Jenassa: A waste. He should’ve slit their throats mid-fuck. That’s what I would’ve done. Bjorlam: No surprise there. You’d probably enjoy it more than the ride itself. Jenassa: The ride is always better when it ends in bloodshed, driver.
